TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang gluban ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 146 buwan, 501 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 469 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 82%, Tayan 8%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na gluban hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na gluban hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na gluban hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na gluban hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na gluban hya' ga nakahara. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣluβan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħara. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang gluban ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 146 buwan, 501 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 469 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 82%, Tayan 8%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na gluban hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na gluban hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na gluban hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na gluban hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na gluban hya' ga nakahara. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣluβan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na ɣluβan ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħara. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
